purpose: Define fail-closed tenant isolation boundaries for data, storage, execution, and observability within the existing bootstrap artifact model.

tenant_id_constraints.description: Aligned with existing tenant_id constraints in runtime schemas.

resource_scopes.description: Structured/unstructured content owned by exactly one tenant.
Generated files and intermediate outputs under tenant-local roots.
State entries tracking lifecycle for a tenant and its jobs.
Platform-level references that must never include tenant content payloads.

boundary_invariants.rule: For scopes tenant_data, tenant_artifacts, and tenant_runtime_state, actor.tenant_id MUST equal resource.tenant_id for any allow decision.
boundary_invariants.deterministic_test: Given decision=allow and resource.scope in protected set, assert strict equality actor.tenant_id === resource.tenant_id.

boundary_invariants.rule: Missing, null, or malformed tenant identifiers MUST result in deny.
boundary_invariants.deterministic_test: If actor.tenant_id or resource.tenant_id absent, null, empty, or regex-invalid, assert decision=deny.

boundary_invariants.rule: Any unknown action, unknown resource_type, or unknown scope MUST result in deny.
boundary_invariants.deterministic_test: If input enum value not recognized by contract, assert decision=deny and reason_code=UNKNOWN_CONTEXT.

boundary_invariants.rule: Cross-tenant access cannot be implicitly elevated through shared_control_plane references.
boundary_invariants.deterministic_test: If resource.scope=shared_control_plane and payload contains tenant-owned fields, assert decision=deny.

boundary_invariants.rule: List/query responses MUST be tenant-filtered before decision allow is emitted.
boundary_invariants.deterministic_test: For list/read_many actions with allow, assert effective_filter.tenant_id equals actor.tenant_id.

boundary_invariants.rule: Audit record MUST be generated for every deny and every cross-tenant request attempt.
boundary_invariants.deterministic_test: Given any deny OR actor.tenant_id != resource.tenant_id, assert audit.required=true.

path_boundary_rules.rule: All tenant artifact paths MUST be relative and anchored to tenant-local roots.
Paths referencing another tenant identifier MUST be denied.
path_boundary_rules.deterministic_test: Resolve path tenant token; if token exists and token != actor.tenant_id then deny with TENANT_MISMATCH.

acceptance_tests.name: Fail-closed default deny
acceptance_tests.procedure: Submit request with complete context but no matching allow condition.

acceptance_tests.name: Tenant equality required
acceptance_tests.procedure: Submit protected resource request where actor.tenant_id != resource.tenant_id.

acceptance_tests.name: Unknown action denied
acceptance_tests.procedure: Use action not defined by policy context.

acceptance_tests.name: Path escape denied
acceptance_tests.procedure: Use artifact_path with ../ or absolute prefix.

acceptance_tests.name: Deny events audited
acceptance_tests.procedure: Trigger any deny decision and verify audit payload structure.
acceptance_tests.expected_result: Audit record present with all minimum_audit_record.required_fields
